# Reliable Inspections

> Reliable Inspections is Kentucky's premier certified home and commercial property inspection company. Based in Mount Washington, KY (also known locally as Washington, KY), we serve homeowners, buyers, sellers, and real estate investors throughout the entire Commonwealth of Kentucky. Phone: +1 (502) 901-8427 | Email: mike@reliableinspectionsky.com | Address: Mount Washington, KY 40047

Reliable Inspections provides InterNACHI-certified, architectural-grade property inspections across Kentucky — including Louisville, Lexington, Frankfort, Bowling Green, Elizabethtown, Bardstown, Mount Washington, and all surrounding communities. Our inspectors bring structural engineering expertise and thermal imaging technology to every evaluation. We have completed 4,200+ inspections with a 99.8% client satisfaction rate.

Every inspection includes a full digital report delivered within 24 hours, plus four FREE warranties included at no extra cost:
- 90-Day Structural & Mechanical Warranty
- SewerGard (90-day water and sewer line coverage)
- MoldSafe (90-day mold remediation coverage)
- Platinum Roof Protection (5-year leak repair coverage)

Inspection cost: $300–$500 depending on size and age of the property. Transparent flat-rate pricing with no hidden fees.

Certifications: InterNACHI certified. Inspectors have backgrounds in structural engineering and skilled trades. Protocols exceed Kentucky state requirements. Thermal imaging and moisture detection are included as standard practice.

## Services

- [Full Residential Home Inspection](https://reliable-inspections-y8i9r.sevalla.page/): Comprehensive evaluation of all major home systems — roof, foundation, HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and more. Thermal imaging and moisture detection included at no extra cost.
- [Pre-Purchase Buyer's Inspection](https://reliable-inspections-y8i9r.sevalla.page/): Protect your investment before closing. Identify costly issues before you sign the contract.
- [Pre-Listing Seller's Inspection](https://reliable-inspections-y8i9r.sevalla.page/): Identify problems before listing to maximize your home's value and avoid surprises during buyer negotiations.
- [Condominium / Townhouse Inspection](https://reliable-inspections-y8i9r.sevalla.page/): Specialized inspection tailored to the unique structure and systems of condos and townhouses.
- [Multi-Unit & Rental Property Inspection](https://reliable-inspections-y8i9r.sevalla.page/): Assess investment properties, duplexes, and rental units throughout Kentucky.
- [Commercial Property Inspection](https://reliable-inspections-y8i9r.sevalla.page/): Professional assessment of commercial buildings, office spaces, and facilities.
- [New Home Pre-Delivery Inspection](https://reliable-inspections-y8i9r.sevalla.page/): Ensure your new construction meets all standards before move-in.
- [New Home Year-End / Warranty Inspection](https://reliable-inspections-y8i9r.sevalla.page/): Document warranty items before your builder's 1-year warranty expires.
- [General Home Maintenance Inspection](https://reliable-inspections-y8i9r.sevalla.page/): Proactive annual assessment to plan maintenance and avoid costly future repairs.

## Blog Articles

- [How Thermal Imaging Changed Home Inspections](https://reliable-inspections-y8i9r.sevalla.page/blog/thermal-imaging-in-inspections): Why we include thermal imaging as a standard practice and what it reveals that the naked eye cannot — including hidden moisture, insulation gaps, and electrical hot spots.
- [Understanding Commercial Property Risks](https://reliable-inspections-y8i9r.sevalla.page/blog/understanding-commercial-property-risks): Key risks to evaluate when inspecting commercial real estate in Kentucky, including structural, mechanical, and code compliance concerns.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does a home inspection cost in Kentucky?**
Typically between $300 and $500, depending on the size and age of the home. Reliable Inspections provides transparent, flat-rate pricing with no hidden fees.

**How long does a home inspection take?**
Most inspections take between 2 and 4 hours. Larger or older homes may take longer. Clients receive a full digital report within 24 hours of completion.

**What does a home inspection include?**
All major systems: roof, foundation, HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and more. Standard inspection includes thermal imaging and moisture detection at no extra cost.

**Who hires the home inspector in Kentucky?**
Typically the buyer chooses and hires the home inspector. Sellers sometimes request a pre-listing inspection to identify issues before putting the home on the market.

**Should I be present during the inspection?**
Yes — being present allows you to ask questions in real time and get a firsthand understanding of the property's condition from the inspector.

**Do you serve the Mount Washington / Washington, KY area?**
Yes. Reliable Inspections is based in Mount Washington, KY (40047) and serves all surrounding areas including the greater Louisville metro, Bullitt County, and the entire Commonwealth of Kentucky.

**Are your inspectors certified?**
Yes. Every inspector is InterNACHI certified and has a background in structural engineering or skilled trades.
